## Tags
direction, orientation, this way up, vertical, package, box, fragile, postage, shipping

## Categories
arrows, transportation, mail

## Source
[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/arrows-up-from-line)

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::ArrowsUpFromLine;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        ArrowsUpFromLine { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```
